tasks.hypothesis: Atomic claim generation constrained by exact supporting blocks will reduce unsupported claims.
tasks.implementation: Bind every claim to exact evidence before answer composition; remove unsupported claims.
tasks.evaluation: Representative independent human citation audit plus exact metrics.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: strict support >=0.80, lenient >=0.90, unsupported claim rate <=0.10
tasks.estimated_requests: Requires separately approved bounded QA evaluation
tasks.estimated_tokens: Estimate from a dry-run manifest before approval
tasks.risk: Answers may become shorter or refuse more often.
tasks.rollback: Retain current qa-production-v1 artifacts and prompt version.

tasks.hypothesis: Parser/block alignment and evidence-aware retrieval can raise exact/page availability.
tasks.implementation: Diagnose missing gold blocks, improve indexing alignment, and rerun frozen retrieval protocol without Oracle context.
tasks.estimated_requests: Embedding requests only if an index rebuild is explicitly approved
tasks.estimated_tokens: No LLM required for pure retrieval evaluation
tasks.risk: Index changes may regress other categories.

tasks.hypothesis: Better evidence availability plus coverage-aware synthesis will cover approved required claims.
tasks.implementation: Add evidence coverage planning without weakening citation strictness.
tasks.evaluation: Approved 50-item QA set, category/difficulty breakdown and human audit.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: required claim coverage >=0.80 and answerable accuracy >=0.90
tasks.estimated_requests: 50 QA requests plus bounded retries only after approval
tasks.estimated_tokens: Use Stage 11C usage to prepare a capped budget
tasks.risk: Coverage pressure may increase unsupported claims.

tasks.problem: Deep Research quality evaluation prerequisites are unmet
tasks.hypothesis: Passing retrieval and QA gates makes a bounded quality evaluation meaningful.
tasks.implementation: Freeze a representative manifest, claims, citations and quality rubric before any live run.
tasks.evaluation: Multi-paper quality, citation support and evidence convergence.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Prerequisite P0 gates pass; Deep Research thresholds approved before execution
tasks.estimated_requests: Must be declared in the approved manifest
tasks.estimated_tokens: Must be declared in the approved manifest
tasks.risk: High token cost without prerequisite quality.
tasks.rollback: Stop at budget limits and preserve every attempt.

tasks.hypothesis: Health checks and controlled backoff distinguish provider outage from workflow failure.
tasks.implementation: Add non-billing health/readiness evidence and explicit retry policy.
tasks.evaluation: Failure injection and one separately approved controlled call.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: No silent fallback; failures classified; approved call completes

tasks.problem: Qdrant version and HTTP security warnings
tasks.hypothesis: Compatible versions and TLS/trusted transport remove warnings without retrieval drift.
tasks.implementation: Pin client/server compatibility and configure secure transport.
tasks.evaluation: Health, fixed Top-K comparison and snapshot restore.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: No compatibility or HTTP credential warning; Top-K stable
tasks.risk: Version migration can change retrieval behavior.

tasks.problem: Successful resumed completion is not verified
tasks.hypothesis: With a stable provider, persisted state resumes once and settles usage/reservation exactly once.
tasks.implementation: Repeat the controlled stop/resume protocol with a new approved attempt.
tasks.evaluation: Run artifacts, SQLite checkpoint and request ledger cross-check.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: completed; resume_count=1; no duplicate node/retrieval/request/usage; reservation=0
tasks.estimated_requests: At most one synthesis request after explicit approval
tasks.rollback: Preserve failed run and do not retry automatically.

tasks.problem: Automated support signals are poorly calibrated to human support
tasks.hypothesis: Representative annotations can calibrate automated metrics.
tasks.implementation: Define representative sampling and independent review protocol.
tasks.evaluation: Precision/recall and confusion matrix against human labels.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Calibration thresholds approved before use as a release gate
tasks.estimated_requests: No model requests required for annotation
tasks.rollback: Continue using human audit as authoritative.

tasks.hypothesis: Context and response bounds reduce P95 without quality loss.
tasks.implementation: Profile retrieval, context and provider latency after quality gates pass.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Set only after P0 quality baseline is accepted

tasks.hypothesis: Configured prices make cost budgets portable to paid providers.
tasks.implementation: Add versioned pricing configuration and cost tests.
tasks.evaluation: Ledger reconciliation with synthetic and approved paid usage.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Exact Decimal reconciliation and budget stop
tasks.estimated_requests: No paid request until separately approved

tasks.problem: Corpus breadth is limited to 34 documents
tasks.hypothesis: A broader corpus exposes generalization failures.
tasks.implementation: Create a separately versioned corpus and gold protocol.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Not a v1 prerequisite; define before expansion
tasks.risk: Scope expansion delays core quality closure.

tasks.hypothesis: A larger model may improve supported claim coverage.
tasks.implementation: Run a controlled model-only comparison after retrieval is fixed.
tasks.evaluation: Same frozen contexts, prompt and human quality rubric.
tasks.acceptance_threshold: Must beat accepted model without citation regression
tasks.estimated_tokens: Budget must be approved from provider pricing
